codeReview.summary: The fix correctly normalizes legacy or unsupported AI providers from localStorage and daemon responses to the supported provider set, and it resets mismatched model IDs to the active provider default before state is used or persisted.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The tauri-fullstack skill currently requires Rust-first TDD and browser verification even for small frontend-only config migration fixes, which did not match this feature's implementation needs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature description only targeted `packages/ui/src/lib/config-context.tsx`; transcript handoff.skillFeedback marks `followedProcedure: false` because steps 3 and 6 were intentionally skipped for this TypeScript-only migration, yet the implementation and validators still matched the feature requirements.

summary: Reviewed commit c6bec25 for fix-gemini-config-migration. The implementation satisfies the requested migration behavior in config hydration, no blocking or non-blocking code issues were found, and one skill-procedure gap was noted for scrutiny triage.
